narrative_beat: Medium de porta celestial dourada se fechando lentamente, ultima sombra humana passando, feixe de luz reduzindo

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a colossal golden celestial gate with ornate filigree and embossed angel wings, slowly closing inward, the narrowing gap revealing blinding white-gold light beyond, a single dark human silhouette slipping through at the last moment
subject.focal_point: the silhouette passing through the narrowing gap of light
subject.secondary: golden dust cascading from the moving gate, light beam narrowing
props: golden celestial gate with angel filigree

environment.location: threshold between earthly darkness and divine radiance
environment.time_of_day: cosmic twilight, light only from beyond the gate
environment.atmosphere: final passage, the gate closes for the last time

composition.foreground: golden gate surface with warm filigree detail
composition.midground: silhouette in the narrowing light gap
composition.background: blinding white-gold divine light with desaturated darkness framing it

lighting.key_light: blinding white-gold light from beyond the gate, diminishing
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on the silhouette figure
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard shadows growing as gate closes

style.post_processing: extreme halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares from diminishing gap
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, golden dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: final opportunity, the window is closing

symbolism.primary: the narrow gate of Matthew 7:13-14 — few find it, and it is closing
symbolism.secondary: the last silhouette as the remnant who made it through

negative_as_positive: anonymous silhouette figure only, no identifiable facial features
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated surrounding darkness, warm saturated gate and light only
tack-sharp focus on silhouette and gate edge

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
